history.phase: Competitive: Multi-LLM provider support — Anthropic Claude + Google Gemini + OpenRouter
history.reason: Extended signal-summary.ts with 3 new LLM providers: (1) Anthropic claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 — fast, low-cost, privacy-friendly via ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; (2) Google Gemini 2.0 Flash — free tier available via GEMINI_API_KEY; (3) OpenRouter — 100+ models via single API key, OPENROUTER_API_KEY + OPENROUTER_MODEL env. Priority chain: Anthropic → OpenAI → Gemini → OpenRouter → Ollama → extractive. Updated AISummary.model union type. Updated .env.example with all 5 options documented. Added 4 new test cases: Anthropic call (anthropic.com endpoint), Gemini call (generativelanguage.googleapis.com), OpenRouter call (openrouter.ai), Anthropic priority over OpenAI. WorldPulse now has 5-provider LLM support matching Crucix's multi-model architecture.
history.competition_intel_updates: MAJOR UPDATE: WorldMonitor (worldmonitor.app) upgraded from GitHub project to full production website with marketing infrastructure. Now has 4-tier AI fallback chain including local LLMs — direct threat to WorldPulse's AI summary feature. Upgraded WorldMonitor to very_high threat. Crucix stable ~5.2K stars (no new features or feeds since cycle 62). Shadowbroker stable. Ground News stable v4.27.0. VeryAI raised $10M seed (identity verification, not news intelligence — adjacent). No new news-intelligence startups with significant funding. AI startup funding still directed at infrastructure not news media. Cycle 65 audit also found P2-3/P2-4/P3-2/i18n were already implemented in prior cycles but unrecorded — all 4 now recorded as completed.

history.phase: P2-1: Reliability Score Explainer Tooltip — always-on hover tooltip with score % + visual bar
history.reason: Enhanced ReliabilityDots.tsx: (1) Removed hasTooltip gate — tooltip always visible on hover for any caller; (2) Added colour-coded percentage score header (green ≥80, amber ≥60, yellow ≥40, red <40); (3) Added 3px score fill bar; (4) All 7 usage sites covered including posts/search pages that previously got no tooltip; (5) 'Sources' renamed to 'Sources verified'; (6) Tooltip width 210→220px. Commit blocked by NTFS HEAD.lock.
history.competition_intel_updates: Ground News: stable, no new major features March 2026, feature velocity slowing. Crucix: ~5.2K stars stable (growth plateau post-viral spike), still 27 feeds. No new news-intelligence startups with significant funding in March 2026. AI funding remains directed at infrastructure (OpenAI $110B, Anthropic) not news media.

history.phase: P2-6: Public API Endpoint — GET /api/v1/public/signals
history.reason: Implemented public API endpoint as core open-source differentiator. (1) apps/api/src/routes/public.ts — GET /signals + OPTIONS /signals: no auth, 60rpm per IP, category/severity/limit/offset params, verified-only, 8 public fields, 30s Redis cache + X-Cache-Hit header, CORS Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *. (2) Registered in apps/api/src/index.ts at /api/v1/public. (3) 10-case test suite (public-api.test.ts): 200+array, category/severity filter, limit clamp, CORS, verified-only, rate limit header, cache hit, response shape, OPTIONS preflight. (4) docs/api.md — full reference with params table, response shape, curl + JS fetch examples, pagination helper. No competitor has a documented public no-auth API.
history.competition_intel_updates: NEW: eYou (Romanian startup, €300K pre-seed from Fil Rouge Capital) — real-time fact-checking social network, claim verification pop-up per post, launching May 2026. Adjacent threat (social, not OSINT). LOW threat to WorldPulse. Crucix update: added Ollama self-hosted LLM provider (7 providers total: Claude/GPT/Gemini/OpenRouter/ChatGPT/MiniMax/Ollama). Mobile control panel UI fixes. Still 27 feeds, ~5.2K stars (stable). Ground News: stable v4.27.0. No major news-intelligence startups funded in March 2026.

history.phase: Competitive: Economic/Market Intelligence OSINT feed (13th feed)
history.reason: Added 13th OSINT signal source: apps/scraper/src/sources/market.ts — polls Yahoo Finance unofficial chart API (no auth) every 15 min for VIX fear index, S&P 500, NASDAQ, BTC-USD, Crude Oil WTI. Threshold-based emission: VIX>=25, index moves>=2%, crypto>=10%, oil>=5%. Exports vixSeverity, percentChangeSeverity, shouldEmitMarketSignal, formatMarketTitle, marketDedupKey, MARKET_INDICATORS for testability. Redis dedup: osint:market:{symbol}:{direction}:{date} 24h TTL. Category:economy, reliability:0.90, location: NYSE. Updated index.ts (13 feeds header + import + try/catch + export). Added 120+ lines tests to osint-sources.test.ts: 5 describe blocks, 21 test cases. Commit required: git add apps/scraper/src/sources/market.ts apps/scraper/src/sources/index.ts apps/scraper/src/sources/__tests__/osint-sources.test.ts && git commit -m 'feat(scraper): add Economic/Market Intelligence OSINT feed — VIX + S&P500 + NASDAQ + BTC + Oil (13th feed)'
history.competition_intel_updates: Crucix stable ~5.2K stars (VERY HIGH). NEW finding: Crucix now confirmed to support 6 LLM providers (Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, Google Gemini, OpenRouter, ChatGPT, MiniMax) for enhanced analysis. CONTRIBUTING.md added — open to community. Still 27 feeds. Ground News stable v4.27.0. No new news-intelligence startups funded in March 2026. WorldPulse market intelligence closes major gap — Crucix's 'Yahoo Finance / VIX / credit risk gauges' was a listed strength gap.

history.phase: P1-3: Admin Dashboard Frontend
history.reason: Built apps/web/src/app/admin/page.tsx (451 lines): JWT admin guard, Scraper Health Grid with per-source status badges and error details, Signal Statistics with 24h/1h counts and severity breakdown, System Health (db/redis/kafka), 30s auto-refresh + manual refresh, skeleton loading, per-section error banners. Also added GET /api/v1/admin/signals/stats backend endpoint. Directly addresses P1-3 priority from PRIORITY_DIRECTIONS.md. Commit blocked by NTFS index.lock — manual git commit required.
history.competition_intel_updates: Crucix stable ~5.2K stars. New minor updates: converted animated tickers to static scrollable lists; added flat-map mobile mode for low-performance devices. No new data feeds added. Shadowbroker stable ~4.7K stars (15 feeds mentioned in HN article). Ground News stable, no major features. No new news-intelligence startups with significant funding in March 2026. WorldPulse admin dashboard improves operational visibility and team coordination.

history.phase: Competitive: Telegram + Discord real-time alert notification system
history.reason: Implemented full Telegram/Discord alerting to counter Crucix core feature. Files: (1) apps/api/src/lib/notifications.ts — NotificationService: sendTelegramMessage/sendDiscordMessage/formatSignalAlert; (2) apps/api/src/lib/alert-dispatcher.ts — AlertDispatcher: shouldNotify (dedup+severity+category), dispatchAlerts, startDispatcher 60s poll; (3) apps/api/src/routes/notifications.ts — GET/PUT /notifications/settings (Redis), POST /notifications/test (3rpm); (4) Registered in index.ts; (5) apps/web/src/app/settings/notifications/page.tsx — full settings UI with bot token, chat ID, webhook URL, severity/category filters, enable toggle, Save+Test; (6) apps/api/src/__tests__/notifications.test.ts — 8+ test cases.
history.competition_intel_updates: Crucix stable ~5.2K stars (VERY HIGH threat, unchanged). Shadowbroker stable ~4.7K stars (no new features). Ground News v4.27.0 stable (no new features). No new funded news-intelligence startups in March 2026. WorldPulse now has Telegram/Discord alerting — matches Crucix core value prop of pinging users when things change.

history.phase: Competitive: WHO Disease Outbreak + IAEA Nuclear Events signal sources
history.reason: Implemented 2 new OSINT signal sources to close Crucix feed gap (10→12 feeds): (1) apps/scraper/src/sources/who.ts — WHO Disease Outbreak News RSS feed (30-min polls, https://www.who.int/rss-feeds/disease-outbreak-news-en.xml, no auth, severity via PHEIC/Grade/pathogen keywords, country location inference from 50+ country lookup, 72h Redis dedup by guid base64 hash, reliability 0.96, category:health); (2) apps/scraper/src/sources/iaea.ts — IAEA Nuclear Events RSS feed (30-min polls, https://www.iaea.org/feeds/news.rss, no auth, filtered by nuclear/radiation safety keywords, INES-level severity mapping, nuclear site coordinate lookup for Fukushima/Zaporizhzhia/Natanz/Iran/etc., 72h Redis dedup, reliability 0.97, category:science); (3) Updated apps/scraper/src/sources/index.ts — registered both pollers (12 feeds total), updated log message and doc comment; (4) Extended apps/scraper/src/sources/__tests__/osint-sources.test.ts — added 32 new test cases covering whoSeverity (4 levels), inferLocation (4 cases), parseRssItems (3 cases), iaeaSeverity (4 levels), isNuclearSafetyItem (6 cases), inferIaeaLocation (4 cases). NTFS index.lock blocked commit — user must run: del .git\index.lock && git add apps/scraper/src/sources/who.ts apps/scraper/src/sources/iaea.ts apps/scraper/src/sources/index.ts apps/scraper/src/sources/__tests__/osint-sources.test.ts && git commit -m 'feat(scraper): add WHO disease outbreak + IAEA nuclear events OSINT feeds (12 feeds total)' && git push
history.competition_intel_updates: Crucix stable ~5.2K stars (VERY HIGH threat). Ground News v4.27.0 stable — no new features. Shadowbroker stable ~4.7K stars. No new funded news-intelligence startups. Oriane (AI video intel, $2M) adjacent but video-focused not news. WorldPulse now at 12 OSINT feeds vs Crucix 27 — gap remains but closing.

history.phase: Developer Experience: GraphQL API layer
history.reason: Implemented full GraphQL API layer using mercurius plugin. apps/api/src/graphql/{schema.ts,resolvers.ts,index.ts} + test file. Signal, User, SignalConnection, PageInfo types. Queries: signal(id), signals(category,severity,limit,offset,since), search(q), trending. Resolvers with PostgreSQL + Redis caching. Registered at /api/graphql. GraphiQL in dev mode. No competitor has GraphQL — pure WorldPulse differentiator.
history.competition_intel_updates: Crucix EXPLOSIVE: 2700 → 5200 stars in 7 days (+93%) — upgraded to very_high threat. Shadowbroker stable ~4.7K. Ground News v4.27.0 stable. New competitor: Veracity (arXiv open-source fact-checking, multilingual, numerical scoring) — medium threat to reliability scoring moat. No new funded startups.

history.phase: Competitive: Carrier Strike Group OSINT tracker
history.reason: DISCOVERED pre-implemented: carrier-strike-groups.ts fully complete with all 11 US Navy carriers, USNI News RSS poller, detectCarrier/detectEventType/eventSeverity/estimatePosition functions, 6h Redis dedup, 30+ test cases. Already registered in sources/index.ts. WorldPulse now has 10 OSINT feeds. Closes last remaining gap vs Shadowbroker.
history.competition_intel_updates: CSG gap vs Shadowbroker closed. WorldPulse 10 feeds. Crucix 27 feeds — feed gap remains large.

history.phase: P1-5 + P1-6: Live signal counter + interactive news ticker
history.reason: Fixed P1-5 (hardcoded signal counter showing 2847 with random increments) and P1-6 (non-interactive news ticker with 7 hardcoded fake items). API: Added GET /api/v1/signals/count (total/last24h/lastHour/bySeverity, 15s Redis cache, 120rpm) and GET /api/v1/signals/headlines (top 10 severity-ordered last 24h, category color mapping, 30s Redis cache). Frontend: TopNav.tsx counter fetches real count on mount + polls 30s. Ticker fetches real headlines every 60s, pauses on hover (animationPlayState), items clickable with router.push to /signals/{id}. New competitor: Crucix (27 feeds, 3D WebGL globe, zero-cloud).
history.competition_intel_updates: New competitor: Crucix (calesthio/Crucix) — 27 intelligence feeds, 3D WebGL globe, zero-cloud, Telegram/Discord alerts, LLM analysis. 'GitHub's Hottest OSINT Project' (March 2026). Direct threat with higher feed count. Taranis AI: updated sentiment-analysis + cybersec-classifier repos (March 18). Shadowbroker stable ~4.7K stars. Ground News v4.27.0 stable.

history.phase: Bug Fix: Auth token key inconsistency + demo data removal
history.reason: Fixed critical auth bug: 4 pages + 1 component used old 'wp_token' localStorage key while auth system sets 'wp_access_token'. Affected: communities/page.tsx (2), communities/[slug]/page.tsx (2), search/page.tsx (1), Composer.tsx (1). All 6 instances → wp_access_token. Removed dead DEMO_SOURCES (7 entries), DEMO_COMMUNITIES (8 entries), DEMO community detail fallback. Pages now show proper empty states. New competitor found: OSINT Monitor (marcko80/osintmonitor) — desktop app, 150+ RSS feeds, multi-source signal fusion.
history.competition_intel_updates: New competitor: OSINT Monitor (marcko80/osintmonitor) — open-source desktop OSINT app with 150+ RSS feeds, multi-source signal fusion, per-country clustering. Desktop-only, no web/mobile, no community layer — WorldPulse differentiators intact. Shadowbroker stable ~4.7K stars. Ground News v4.27.0 stable.

history.phase: Competitive: STIX 2.1 threat intelligence export
history.reason: Shadowbroker has STIX 2.1 export as an open PR (confirmed March 2026 web search). WorldPulse now has full parity: (1) apps/api/src/lib/stix.ts — SignalToStixConverter class with 6 methods: signalToIndicator, signalToSighting, signalToObservedData, signalToReport, signalToLocation, buildBundle. Full STIX 2.1 TypeScript type definitions. Severity→confidence mapping (critical=95, high=80, medium=60, low=30). Location→StixLocation with lat/lng/country. source_url→external_references. TLP:CLEAR object marking. (2) apps/api/src/routes/stix.ts — 3 endpoints: GET /api/v1/stix/signals/:id (single), GET /api/v1/stix/signals (bulk, max 500, filters: category/severity/since/limit), GET /api/v1/stix/feed (TAXII-like, latest 100). All require API key auth. Content-Type: application/stix+json;version=2.1. Rate limited. (3) Registered in apps/api/src/index.ts as '/api/v1/stix' prefix. (4) apps/api/src/__tests__/stix.test.ts — 27 test cases. WorldPulse STIX gap now CLOSED.
history.competition_intel_updates: Shadowbroker: confirmed STIX 2.1 in open PR, also has Carrier Strike Group tracker, SDR integration, Spain CCTV (community), ship 4-category toggle, dismissible threat alerts, parallel Docker builds, removed fake intel generator. Stars stable ~4.7K. Ground News: v4.27.0 (March 2), 2 new Factuality labels, bug fixes. No new funded news-intelligence startups. AMI Labs ($1.03B seed) is foundation model, not news intel. WorldPulse STIX gap closed. Remaining: Carrier Strike Group tracker, SDR integration.

history.phase: Competitive: CelesTrak orbital satellite tracking
history.reason: Shadowbroker added CelesTrak orbital tracking in March 2026 as a key OSINT differentiator (2,000+ active satellites, SGP4 propagation). WorldPulse now has parity: (1) apps/scraper/src/sources/celestrak.ts — SATCAT polling source: polls CelesTrak SATCAT JSON every 30min, generates signals for recent launches (within 7 days) and re-entries (within 3 days), max 10 signals/poll, 48h Redis dedup, reliability 0.97, Kafka pub to signals.verified, integrated as 9th OSINT poller in sources/index.ts; (2) apps/web/src/app/map/page.tsx — browser-side GP visualization: fetches CelesTrak GP JSON (active satellites), parses INCLINATION+RA_OF_ASC_NODE to lat/lon, renders MapLibre GeoJSON circle layer colored by OBJECT_TYPE (PAYLOAD=blue, ROCKET_BODY=gray, DEBRIS=red), 🛰️ SATS toggle with count badge and loading spinner, handles map-not-yet-loaded edge. NTFS index.lock may block commit — user must run: del .git\index.lock then git commit.
history.competition_intel_updates: Shadowbroker: no new features confirmed since March 2026 GIBS/CelesTrak wave. Stars stable. Ground News: continuing multimedia expansion (podcasts, video). No new funded news-intelligence startups found in March 2026. WorldPulse CelesTrak gap now closed. Remaining gaps: Carrier Strike Group tracker, STIX 2.1 export, SDR integration.

history.phase: Competitive: NASA GIBS satellite imagery overlay on live map
history.reason: Shadowbroker added NASA GIBS satellite imagery in March 2026 as a major visual differentiator. WorldPulse now has parity. Added satelliteMode + gibsDate state to apps/web/src/app/map/page.tsx. useEffect dynamically manages 'nasa-gibs' WMTS raster source (MODIS Terra TrueColor, epsg3857) and 'nasa-satellite' raster layer at opacity 0.72, inserted before cluster-halo layer so signal pins stay visible. 🛰 SAT toggle button in filter bar (green when active), inline date picker (2000-02-24 to yesterday) shown when active. NTFS index.lock blocked git commit — user must run: del .git\index.lock then git add/commit from Windows.
history.competition_intel_updates: Shadowbroker: security cleanup (removed 19 test files with hardcoded API keys from git history). Stars stable ~4.7K. No new data feeds confirmed. Ground News: added 2 new Factuality labels on March 2, 2026 (minor feature). No new news-intelligence startups with significant funding in March 2026. Global VC funding hit $189B in February 2026 (record) but 83% went to OpenAI/Anthropic/infra — no direct WorldPulse competitors received significant funding. WorldPulse competitive position unchanged — opportunity window still open.

history.phase: Observability: Sentry error tracking + structured JSON logging + /api/v1/health + OTel tracer
history.reason: Implemented complete 4-part observability suite for WorldPulse. (1) /api/v1/health route — per-service health checks (db=SELECT 1, redis=PING, kafka=admin.listTopics 2s timeout) each returning status/latency_ms/error; HTTP 503 if db down; (2) requestLoggerPlugin Fastify middleware — UUID requestId stamping + structured pino onResponse logs (requestId/userId/method/route/statusCode/latency_ms/ip/userAgent) + onError capture; skips noisy internal endpoints; (3) Sentry optional wrapper lib — dynamic require to avoid hard dep, gracefully no-ops without SENTRY_DSN or package, provides initSentry/captureException/captureMessage/flushSentry; wired into bootstrap + shutdown; (4) OTel-compatible scraper tracer — startSpan/startRootSpan using pino structured logs with traceId/spanId/parentId/operation/attributes; instrumented processArticleGroup (classify/geo/verify spans) + scrapeAll (root scraper.cycle span). Added 11-case health.test.ts. Updated .env.example.
history.competition_intel_updates: Shadowbroker GitHub releases page: no new data feeds since previously tracked features. Stars stable at ~4.7K (March 2026). No major feature releases found. Ground News: no major 2026 updates. No new news-intelligence/verification startups with significant funding found in March 2026 (largest rounds are infrastructure/LLM focused — OpenAI $110B, Anthropic $30B, AMI Labs $1B seed). WorldPulse's open-source observability stack continues to differentiate from closed competitors.

history.phase: P0-5: Fix category channel tabs showing No signals yet
history.reason: Breaking News, Culture, Security channels all showed 'No signals yet' because (1) detectCategory() had no rules for breaking/culture/security/sports — articles fell through to 'other'; (2) even with correct classification, Breaking News needed a severity-based fallback to show existing DB signals. Fix: added 14 keyword rules to detectCategory() in classify.ts including breaking (urgent/developing/emergency keywords), culture (film/music/art/sports/religion/activism), security (cyber/hack/ransomware/cve keywords), sports. Also special-cased category=breaking in both feed/signals and feed/global API routes to query severity IN (critical,high) — immediately populates Breaking News with real production signals. Additionally upgraded LeftSidebar to show live signal counts per channel (useEffect + 2min setInterval) and real trending from GET /api/v1/feed/trending instead of hardcoded demo topics.
history.competition_intel_updates: Shadowbroker: recent GitHub releases focused on UX (Mission Briefing onboarding modal, backend disconnect red banner, README Quick Start overhaul) and STIX 2.1 export. No new data feeds beyond previously tracked 15. Star count stable at ~4.7K. Ground News: v4.27.0 (March 2 2026) = bug fixes only, no major new features. No new news-intelligence/verification startups with significant funding found. AI funding overall at record levels but no direct competitors found. Linara (directions group), TRACE ASI (market analysis), Business Chief (executive intel) launched but none compete directly with WorldPulse's open-source OSINT network.

history.phase: Competitive: AI content farm / slop detection for reliability scoring
history.reason: Implemented open-source AI content farm detection to compete with NewsGuard's closed $$$-API. (1) apps/api/src/lib/ai-content-farms.ts — 25-domain blocklist seeded from NewsGuard/CCDH public reports, exportable const for easy updates; (2) apps/api/src/lib/slop-detector.ts — SlopDetector class: domain blocklist check (+0.40), missing byline (+0.15), clickbait regex patterns (+0.10), thin content <100 chars (+0.10), high cadence tracking via Redis INCR >10/hr (+0.10), bare URL path (+0.05), score clamped [0,1], Redis 24h TTL cache, singleton export; (3) GET /:id/slop-score route added to signals.ts — admin-only (account_type='admin'), authenticates via existing middleware, queries signal from DB, calls slopDetector.scoreSignal(), returns {score, flags, isSlop, cached}; (4) AISlopBadge component added to SignalDetailClient.tsx — useEffect fetches /slop-score on mount, shows amber ⚠ AI-generated content suspected badge with amber glassmorphism styling when isSlop=true, graceful fetch error handling (no badge on error/non-admin 403); (5) apps/api/src/__tests__/slop-detector.test.ts — 11 test cases: clean signal (score 0), blocklist hit, no-byline, null-author, clickbait title, thin content, empty content (no thin penalty), score clamping to 1.0, cache hit (cached=true), bare URL path, high-slop composite signal >=0.7, invalidateCache. Commit blocked by persistent NTFS index.lock.
history.competition_intel_updates: Shadowbroker: no new features beyond previously tracked (NASA GIBS, CelesTrak, Carrier Strike Group, SDR integration). Star count stable at ~4.7K. Ground News: no major 2026 updates found beyond previously tracked features (Podcasts/Opinions, Daily Briefing, compact mode). New open-source fact-checking paper found: Veracity (arxiv) — research system with transparent reliability scoring, multilingual support. Not yet a consumer product. AI detector tools market growing (YouScan, Ranktracker coverage). WorldPulse slop detection now differentiates from NewsGuard's closed methodology.

history.phase: Competitive: GPS Jamming (GPSJam.org) + Internet Outage (IODA) signal sources
history.reason: Shadowbroker confirmed at ~4.7K GitHub stars (up from 2.0K). GPS jamming + IODA internet outage were explicitly listed as PENDING response actions in competition_intel.json. Created (1) apps/scraper/src/sources/gpsjam.ts — polls GPSJam.org GeoJSON API every 15min (no auth), filters cells with jamPct>=0.6, sorts by severity descending, top 10 per poll, centroid extraction for Polygon+Point geometries, 2h Redis dedup by 1° grid, severity 0.9+→high/0.7+→medium/<0.7→low, reliability 0.78, tags: osint/gps/jamming/electronic-warfare; (2) apps/scraper/src/sources/ioda.ts — polls IODA v2 alerts API every 10min (no auth), country-level entities, minScore>=30, 10-min lookback window, severity 500+→critical/100+→high/30+→medium/else→low, 30-min dedup per entity+bucket, 27-country centroid lookup table, reliability 0.87, tags: osint/internet/outage/ioda/connectivity; (3) Updated sources/index.ts — 8 pollers total, updated banner log message; (4) Updated apps/scraper/.env.example — 6 new env vars (GPSJAM_INTERVAL_MS/MIN_PCT/MAX_SIGNALS, IODA_INTERVAL_MS/MIN_SCORE/LOOKBACK_S); (5) Appended 12 new tests to osint-sources.test.ts — gpsjamSeverity (5 cases) + iodaSeverity (6 cases) with boundary checks. WorldPulse now 8 OSINT feeds. Commit blocked by persistent NTFS index.lock.
history.competition_intel_updates: Shadowbroker confirmed ~4.7K GitHub stars (Star History tweet). Ground News: only bug fixes (March 2, 2026 update), no major new features. No new news-intelligence/verification startups with significant funding found. AI content farms: NewsGuard tracking 3,006 sites, 300-500 new/month — added ai_slop_detection task (priority 6) to pending queue. New opportunity identified: AI slop detection as differentiator vs NewsGuard's closed methodology.

history.phase: P0 Fix: Feed clickability, /posts/[id] page, explore nav, geocode backfill

Commit blocked by index.lock.
history.competition_intel_updates: Shadowbroker: removed fake intelligence generator, added backend connection banner — now pure real OSINT. Ground News: v4.27.0 bugfixes only, no major new features. No new news-intelligence startups with significant funding found in March 2026. AI general funding still dominated by infrastructure players (Temporal $300M, Resolve AI $125M).

history.phase: Competitive: USGS Seismic + NASA FIRMS Fire + NOAA Space Weather signal sources
history.reason: Created 3 new OSINT source files in apps/scraper/src/sources/: (1) seismic.ts — polls USGS GeoJSON feed (M4.5+/hour) every 5min, severity from magnitude (M7+→critical, M6+→high, M5+→medium, else→low), 48h Redis dedup by USGS feature ID, reliability 0.95; (2) firms.ts — polls NASA FIRMS NOAA-20 VIIRS public CSV every 30min, manual CSV parser (no deps), aggregates detections into 1° grid cells, sorts by FRP, top 20 signals per poll, severity FRP 500+→critical/200+→high/50+→medium, 3h dedup, reliability 0.80; (3) spaceweather.ts — polls NOAA SWPC alerts.json every 10min, filters GEOMAGNETIC/SOLAR/RADIO keywords, age < 3h, G/R/S scale severity mapping (G5/R5/S5→critical, G4/R4/S4→high, G3/R3/S3→medium), 24h dedup by serial_number, location Global (0,0), reliability 0.90. Updated sources/index.ts (6 pollers). Updated .env.example (3 new vars). Extended osint-sources.test.ts to 425 lines with seismic/firms/spaceweather severity + CSV parsing + dedup key tests. Commit blocked by index.lock — all files in working tree.
history.competition_intel_updates: Shadowbroker confirmed expanded to 'dozens' of feeds: NASA GIBS satellite imagery (MODIS Terra, 30-day time slider), CelesTrak orbital tracking (2000+ satellites, SGP4), Carrier Strike Group Tracker (all 11 US Navy carriers), SIGINT/RISINT News Feed (up to 20 customizable sources), software-defined radio, GPS jamming, CCTV networks. Built with Next.js + MapLibre GL + FastAPI + Python. No new news-intelligence startups with funding found. AI funding records: OpenAI $110B, Anthropic $30B, ElevenLabs $500M in Feb 2026.

history.phase: Competitive Gap: Embeddable widget for third-party sites
history.reason: Implemented complete embeddable widget system: (1) apps/web/src/app/embed/layout.tsx — minimal iframe layout without global nav, inline CSS reset for cross-origin rendering; (2) apps/web/src/app/embed/page.tsx — 'use client' compact signal feed with dark/light theme support, severity-color-coded cards, reliability dots (●●●●●), timeAgo formatting, 30s polling via setInterval, hydration-safe URL param parsing (ready flag), configurable via ?theme/limit/category/apiBase; (3) apps/web/src/app/embed/widget.js/route.ts — Next.js route serving self-contained IIFE embed script as application/javascript, reads data-* attrs from script tag, builds iframe URL, injects responsive wrapper div, supports data-container for explicit target element, data-origin for self-hosted deployments, 5min cache; (4) apps/web/src/middleware.ts — /embed route detection, sets Access-Control-Allow-Origin:*, removes X-Frame-Options, uses frame-ancestors:* CSP instead of DENY; (5) apps/api/src/routes/embed.ts — Fastify route GET /api/v1/embed/signals, OPTIONS pre-flight, public (no auth), Redis 30s cache, rate limit 120rpm, supports limit/category/severity params, X-Cache-Hit header; (6) apps/api/src/index.ts — registerEmbedRoutes at /api/v1/embed; (7) docs/embed-widget.md — comprehensive integration guide with quick-start, full attribute table, direct iframe examples, public API reference, CSP guidance, self-hosted instructions. Commit blocked by persistent NTFS index.lock — all 7 files in working tree.
history.competition_intel_updates: Shadowbroker expanded to 18+ feeds: NASA FIRMS fire hotspots (NOAA-20 VIIRS), Space Weather (NOAA SWPC Kp badge), Internet Outage monitoring (Georgia Tech IODA). Settings panel redesigned with tabbed UI. Mission Briefing onboarding added. New priority task created: shadowbroker_seismic_satellite (priority 7) to match with USGS seismic + NASA FIRMS + NOAA Space Weather feeds. Ground News: 7.9M monthly visits confirmed, top competitors newsbreak.com/allsides.com by traffic. No major new 2026 features beyond previously known. NewsGuard + Pangram AI content farm detection: 3,006 sites tracked, 300-500 new/month. New feature category identified: AI slop detection for reliability scoring.

history.phase: Competitive: GDELT + ADS-B + AIS as scraper signal sources
history.reason: Created apps/scraper/src/sources/ module with 4 files: (1) gdelt.ts — polls GDELT Full-Text Doc API (https://api.gdeltproject.org/api/v2/doc/doc) every 15min with conflict/war/attack query, severity derived from title keywords (critical/high/medium/low), geo from 20-country centroid lookup table, Redis dedup 24h TTL, maps to signals DB; (2) adsb.ts — polls OpenSky Network /states/all every 5min (anonymous, no auth), filters emergency squawk codes 7500 (hijacking→critical/security), 7600 (radio failure→medium/security), 7700 (emergency→high/disaster), per-hour Redis dedup, includes aircraft ICAO24/callsign/position; (3) ais.ts — connects to aisstream.io WebSocket using native Node.js TLS (no external deps), monitors distress status 14 (AIS-SART active→critical) and 15 (undefined→high), gracefully skips if AIS_STREAM_API_KEY not set, full WebSocket frame encoder/decoder implemented; (4) sources/index.ts — startOsintPollers(db, redis, producer?) orchestrator with per-poller error isolation; integrated into apps/scraper/src/index.ts bootstrap(); 12-test suite covering severity derivation, geo extraction, squawk classification, dedup key structure, WebSocket frame encoding; .env.example updated with GDELT_INTERVAL_MS, ADSB_INTERVAL_MS, AIS_STREAM_API_KEY docs.
history.competition_intel_updates: Shadowbroker confirmed growing rapidly: 304 HN points, 120 comments, now covered by American Partisan + Medium + Hackers Arise + daily.dev. Expanding beyond 15 original feeds. WorldPulse now matches GDELT/ADS-B/AIS coverage. Ground News: Daily Briefing + Podcasts/Opinions + compact mode — no major new competitive threats. GDELT: stable, no new 2026 API changes, TV News Visual Explorer updated March 19.

history.phase: Competitive: AI-generated signal summaries
history.reason: Implemented complete AI signal summary system to counter Ground News 'AI Ground Summary': (1) apps/api/src/lib/signal-summary.ts — generateSignalSummary()/refreshSignalSummary() with OpenAI gpt-4o-mini, Ollama, and extractive fallback; Redis cache 24h TTL; cache invalidation; (2) signals.ts route updated — GET /:id now includes aiSummary, new GET /:id/summary endpoint (30rpm, supports ?refresh=true for authenticated users); (3) packages/types/src/index.ts — aiSummary optional field on Signal type; (4) apps/web/src/components/signals/AISummary.tsx — collapsible widget with sparkle icon, model badge (GPT-4o mini / Local AI / Auto-summary), skeleton loading, refresh button for admins; (5) SignalDetailClient.tsx updated with AISummary component after body section; (6) 8-test test suite (signal-summary.test.ts) covering cache hit/miss, extractive fallback, LLM failure fallback, invalidation, refresh; (7) apps/api/.env.example updated with OPENAI_API_KEY and OLLAMA_URL docs. Commit BLOCKED by persistent index.lock on Windows NTFS — see blockers.md for manual resolution steps.
history.competition_intel_updates: Ground News: AI Ground Summary confirmed on all articles (key differentiator gap now closed by WorldPulse). Ad Fontes Media Bias Chart updated with AI assistance for 2026 — expanding to podcasts/newsletters. No new major news-intelligence startups found. LLM summarization landscape: Qwen3-30B, GLM-4.5V, OpenAI GPT-OSS-120B among top open-source summarization models 2026.

history.phase: Competitive Gap: API rate limiting and monetization strategy
history.reason: Implemented Developer API key system: (1) DB migration apps/api/src/db/migrations/007_api_keys.sql — api_keys table with UUID PK, user FK, tier CHECK constraint, active flag, indexes; (2) apps/api/src/lib/api-keys.ts — generateApiKey() produces 'wp_live_<32hex>', hashKey SHA-256, verifyKey timing-safe, TIER_LIMITS (free 60rpm/1000rpd, pro 300rpm/10000rpd, enterprise unlimited); (3) apps/api/src/routes/developer.ts — POST create (returns plaintext key ONCE), GET list, DELETE revoke (soft); (4) apps/web/src/app/developer/page.tsx — full developer portal with tier cards, keys table, create modal with one-time copy, revoke. Backend committed e73f2ad. Frontend in working tree (index.lock blocked commit — manual resolution needed).
history.competition_intel_updates: New competitor: Shadowbroker — real-time OSINT dashboard pulling 15 live global feeds (ADS-B, AIS, N2YO satellite, GDELT) into a single MapLibre map — Show HN March 8, 2026, HIGH threat level. Also: The Newsroom and Nobias (AI trustworthiness scoring startups), AI Accountability Act passed US March 2026 (opportunity for WorldPulse's open verification). Ground News confirmed: 50K+ sources, AI Ground Summary on all articles. No new major funding rounds directly in news intelligence space this cycle.

history.phase: Phase 6b — Onboarding Flow
history.reason: Already fully implemented in commit a105e3c: /onboarding multi-step wizard (3-slide animated welcome, 8-category interest selection, 10-region selection, follow suggestions from API), DB migration (onboarded BOOLEAN, interests TEXT[], regions TEXT[]), PATCH /api/v1/users/me/onboarding route, and login/register auth redirects. Confirmed complete without additional work needed.

history.phase: Phase 7 — End-to-End Tests + Security Hardening
history.reason: Created apps/api/src/routes/__tests__/e2e.test.ts with ~60 test cases covering: auth (register/login with all edge cases), feed (global/trending/signals with pagination and filters), signals (list/detail/map with geo queries), search (full-text, zero-results, filters, facets, pagination), posts (create with auth, like/unlike toggle, 404 handling). All other security items confirmed pre-existing: rate limiting (Redis-backed, all endpoint tiers), Zod validation on all POST/PUT routes, CORS (@fastify/cors, worldpulse.io + localhost), security headers in Next.js middleware (CSP, X-Frame-Options, HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy). Manual dependency audit: no high/critical CVEs found.
history.competition_intel_updates: New competitor identified: OpenNews — open-source browser-based AI news aggregator clustering 116 RSS feeds. Threat level: medium. Differentiators: WorldPulse has real-time WebSocket, geospatial map, user accounts, community verification, reliability scoring — all absent from OpenNews.

history.phase: Phase 6a — Verification Engine: Reliability Scoring UI
history.reason: Audit confirmed all 4 surfaces (FeedList, map/page, search/page, SignalDetailClient) already had ReliabilityDots (1-5 scale + tooltip), BREAKING badge (age<30min), CONTESTED badge (flagCount>=3 || status=disputed), and FlagModal. Types isBreaking and communityFlagCount already on Signal. Fix applied: SignalDetailClient.tsx was using a local 60-line custom dot renderer — refactored to use shared <ReliabilityDots> component for full UI consistency.
history.competition_intel_updates: New competitor: Intell Weave — production-minded AI news platform with claim verification, NLP-powered personalized feeds, web ingestion at scale. Threat level: MEDIUM. Ground News v4.27.0 (March 2, 2026) — no major new features, browser reader experience improvement. No new AI news intelligence funding rounds specifically targeting WorldPulse's space identified.

history.phase: Phase 3b — Search: API + UI (verification + analytics enhancement)
history.reason: Phase 3b was largely pre-implemented: GET /api/v1/search with facets, autocomplete, Cmd+K palette, /search page with tabs and filters — all present in working tree. Cycle 9 added search_analytics PostgreSQL table (idempotent migration) with dual-write alongside ClickHouse. Verified: 6 test files exist (up from 0). New competitors found: WorldMonitor (open-source global intel dashboard — HIGH threat), OpenClaw OSINT (medium threat). Ground News expanded to 50K+ sources.
history.competition_intel_updates: WorldMonitor (koala73/worldmonitor) — open-source global intelligence dashboard, direct positioning overlap, HIGH threat. OpenClaw OSINT — production news monitoring system for Middle East, MEDIUM threat. Ground News: expanded to 50K+ sources, added Podcasts/Opinions, Daily Briefing, compact mode (threat elevated to HIGH).

history.phase: Performance: Rate Limiting + Redis Caching — Signals Routes
history.reason: Signals route had 0 rate limiting and 0 Redis caching. Added: 60/min on all read routes, 10/min on writes, 5/min on admin delete. Redis caching: /map/points (30s PostGIS cache), GET /:id (60s detail cache), GET / first page (20s anonymous list cache). Cache invalidation on PATCH/DELETE/flag. Commit 2066cbd.
history.competition_intel_updates: Identified Taranis AI (taranis-ai/taranis-ai) as new direct open-source OSINT competitor with AI/NLP. Also Valinor Intelligence (UK) and SAHAR/Crowlingo acquisition in French market.

history.phase: Phase 1d — Kafka Consumer Lag Monitoring
history.reason: Already implemented by Phase 1b: prometheus/rules/worldpulse.yml has KafkaConsumerLagHigh (>1000), KafkaConsumerLagCritical (>5000), and lag alerts for all 3 topics. Grafana dashboard scraper.json covers Kafka consumer lag, messages/sec, scraper throughput, error rate. Marked complete, no work needed.
